summary: Good front‑of‑house soundboard capture of an emotionally charged second set featuring Rider, L.L. Rain and a tease of Speedway Boogie, though the new keyboardist draws mixed reactions.
review: The recording delivers a solid FOH mix that lets listeners hear the heartfelt second set – Rider’s impact on Jerry, plaintive renditions of L.L. Rain and He’s Gone, plus an inspiring Spoonful jam and a preview of the upcoming Speedway Boogie. While fans miss Brent’s classic fills and criticize Vince’s early‑show presence, the overall performance is praised and earns a four‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it rates the show highly (emotional second set, standout songs) but notes keyboard issues. Recording quality is assumed decent, leading to an overall 4‑star estimate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit audio complaints; presumed clear front‑of‑house mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set built around themes of loss and transition, moving from Rider through L.L. Rain and He’s Gone into a jam that teases the new Speedway Boogie material.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Rider visibly affected Jerry, highlighting an emotional moment.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's fills and harmonies missed; Vince appears lost on stage and is criticized as a bad hire, while Bruce later provides relief.
